sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nitak a ni a tum lamdang sa ing
Nisuah zong lamdang sa sem ing
Ka lungsim hong khoih kha a
Pasian in hong itna hi nuam sing

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pasian in kei hong it zenzen

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: an lak hunte lamdang si ee
Ka lungsim hong khoih kha a lamdang pen
Hih ka phawk thak hong it na thu hi
